abilities.name: Dismember
abilities.description: When attack causes Severe Critical Effect, may discard card to change Critical Effect to Amputated without changing location.

abilities.name: Tethered Soul
abilities.description: If killed within 6 yards of friendly Enforcer/Henchman/Master, that character may discard card to bind spirit, transforming into friendly Shackled Spirit appearing adjacent to corpse (cannot act this round).

actions: (1) Salvaged Greatsword (Heavy Melee) | AV: 5 (10) | Rg: y2 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 3/4/6 damage. Damage flip gains + if not from Charge Action.
(1) Shield Slam (Melee) | AV: 6 (11) | Rg: y2 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 1/2/3 damage and pushed 1 yard away.
system.notes: Desperate slum-dwellers inspired by Reva Cortinas. Took up salvaged Guardian weapons and shields. Rise as Shackled Spirits when fallen.
